caption: A man wearing a green t-shirt, a black baseball cap, and headphones speaks into a professional microphone in an indoor setting. His t-shirt features the text "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" in a stylized white font. He is positioned in front of a wall decorated with several framed photographs. Behind him, a white mannequin wearing a white garment stands near clothing racks filled with various garments. A logo reading "REALLY TOT" is visible in the lower right of each scene, and a circular logo is in the lower left. Throughout the sequence, the man gestures with his hands while talking, shifting from an open-armed pose to more focused hand movements. The camera angle remains constant, capturing him from the chest up as he interacts with someone off-screen.
